pi_items.source: Task description explicitly lists this coordinate. export_result.sh checks for latitude BETWEEN 37.24 AND 37.34 and verifier.py checks abs(db_lat - 37.29) <= 0.05.
Task description explicitly lists this coordinate. export_result.sh checks for longitude BETWEEN 136.73 AND 136.83 and verifier.py checks abs(db_lon - 136.78) <= 0.05.
Task description explicitly lists 12.0 km. export_result.sh checks for depth BETWEEN 10.0 AND 14.0 and verifier.py checks abs(db_depth - 12.0) <= 2.0.
Task description explicitly lists 2024-01-01 16:18:47.00. export_result.sh queries for time_value BETWEEN 2024-01-01 16:18:42 AND 2024-01-01 16:18:52.
Task description explicitly asks for this path. export_result.sh hardcodes REPORT_FILE to /home/ga/aftershock_report.txt and tests for its existence and content.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to enter a set of earthquake parameters, corresponding to a real-world aftershock of the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake. The required input parameters are defined precisely in the prompt (latitude 37.29, longitude 136.78, depth 12.0, time 2024-01-01 16:18:47), and export_result.sh enforces bounds closely centered on these values (+/-0.05 degrees, +/-2km, +/-5s). The output report must be saved directly to /home/ga/aftershock_report.txt, as tested by the evaluation scripts.
